description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt and tie. The suit jacket is buttoned, and the pants are tailored, giving a professional and polished appearance. The figure's facial features are defined, with short, neatly styled hair and a neutral expression. The hands are relaxed at the sides, and the overall build is average, with realistic human proportions. The shoes are formal, matching the business attire, and the figure stands upright in a natural pose. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing the formal style.
description: A formally dressed adult male in a business suit, standing upright with a neutral expression and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit, tie, facial features, and both hands at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, pants, and the back of the head.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with visible hand and shoe details.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tie
